headline: Post-click is largely healthy — the quiz path held; the small PDP dip is downstream of weaker traffic, not a broken page.

paths.cro_read: Message-matched and converting; gift-intent over-indexes here. Value-prop clarity and CTA both strong. No action needed.

Dip is modest and coincides with lower-quality, fatigued-creative clicks landing here. Headline still matches the durable static-creative promise; the loss is upstream-driven, not a new on-page defect.
paths.verdict: soft, but downstream of the creative problem

cro_framework_pass.headline_match: OK — but a fresh ad angle must keep PDP headline match to avoid introducing drift
cro_framework_pass.friction: No new friction this week (no changes shipped)

quick_wins: Route more gift-intent traffic to the quiz funnel (it converts ~2x PDP) rather than PDP.
high_impact_changes: None warranted this week — do not refactor a healthy funnel while the constraint is upstream (avoid local-optimum work).
seed_test_ideas: If a fresh creative angle is chosen, ensure landing headline matches it (message-match test ride-along).
Quiz-first vs PDP-first routing for gift-intent (park for a later week).
implication: Funnel is not the binding constraint. Surfacing the quiz-routing quick win, but the page does not need a redesign this week.
source: cro / CRO Analysis Framework (value-prop -> friction, Quick Wins vs High-Impact, Test Ideas)
